title: sloanea sinemariensis
intro: Sloanea sinemariensis, also known as the Maypuri tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Eopterocarpaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in the Philippines, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sloanea sinemariensis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and wounds, as well as being used as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Sloanea sinemariensis can be made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other plants to enhance their medicinal effects.
